title: Boar SMP Fabric
description: A small pack to improve your experience on the Boar SMP server. Includes Boars!
body:
Included Mods:
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features (Used for retexturing pigs to boars)
- AppleSkin (Shows saturation on food and hunger bar)
- Better Advancements (Puts the advancement menu in fullscreen)
- Connectivity (Solves lots of connection-related problems like timeouts and packet size exceptions)
- Controlling (Adds searching and filters to the keybinds menu)
- Entity Culling (Improves performance by not rendering stuff you cant see)
- fix GPU memory leak (fixes GPU memory leaks(Big suprise, I know))
- Jade (WAYLA/HWYLA for newer versions, shows what block/entity youre looking at)
- Just Enough Items (JEI) (Adds a searchable sidebar with all items to inventories)
- Just Enough Professions (Adds villager professions and workstations to JEI)
- Just Enough Breeding (Adds breedind information to JEI)
- Just enough Effect Descriptions (Adds descriptions to status effects)
- ModernFix (Many many bugfixes and optimizations, improves performance)
- Mouse Tweaks (Improvees the way you can interact with items in inventories)
- Not Enough Animations (Brings lots of animations to second- and third-person)
- Sodium (Improves performance)
- Sodium Extra (Adds settings 
- spark (used for performance profiling, disabled by default)
- Xaero's Minimap (Minimap)
- Xaero's Worldmap (Worldmap)
- Simple Discord Rich Presence (Adds an activity on Discord, disable if you dont want your current dimension shown)![Discord Rich Presence Showing a User playing on Boar SMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c2180a9daaa1dbc0b86529ee462c025dd7b8b66.png)
